channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Atiku condemns Wike’s threat to journalist as dangerous and unacceptable
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don come out strongly against the statement wey Nyesom Wike, Minister of the FCT, make against journalist Seun Okinbaloye. Atiku talk say e dey disgraceful and dan...

item.title: Trump sets 48-hour deadline for Iran amid escalating Middle East conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued a stern warning to Iran, giving Tehran 48 hours to reach a deal or face severe consequences, as tensions in the Middle East escalate. This latest ultimatum follows...

item.title: Holy Saturday Sermon: Reflections on Easter and Faith
item.description: For dis Holy Saturday, Bishop Matthew Hassan Kukah for Sokoto celebrate di climax of di Christian Lenten journey. Him sermon mark di resurrection of Jesus Christ, di night wey end all fear, darkness, ...

item.title: Easter holiday bookings remain largely stable despite record fuel prices
item.description: Despite record-high petrol prices, the anticipated surge in Easter holiday booking cancellations has not materialised. NRMA, which operates roughly 50 holiday parks and resorts across Australia, repor...

item.title: Filipinos Head Back to Metro Manila and Provinces After Holy Week
item.description: After the three-day Holy Week break, Filipinos have started returning to their workplaces and homes on Easter Sunday. In key bus terminals across Metro Manila, such as Cubao in Quezon City and Rizal A...

item.title: Four people die and toddler critically injured in multiple road accidents across Queensland
item.description: Queensland experienced a tragic night of multiple road accidents resulting in four deaths and one critically injured toddler. Around 9pm on Saturday, a head-on collision occurred on School Road in Log...

item.title: Yanga win big against Prisons to strengthen top position in NBC Premier League
item.description: Dar es Salaam. Young Africans SC, popularly known as Yanga, bounced back strongly in the NBC Premier League by defeating Tanzania Prisons 3-0 at KMC Complex. This win ended their recent three-match dr...

item.title: Occasional Heavy Drinking Significantly Increases Liver Fibrosis Risk in Adults with MASLD
item.description: A recent study from Keck Medicine of USC highlights that episodic heavy drinking—even just once a month—substantially increases the risk of advanced liver scarring, particularly in individuals with me...

item.title: Reflections on Leadership and Development in Murang’a County
item.description: Governor Irungu Kang'ata of Murang’a County compares the journey of governorship to pursuing a PhD, where learning never really ends and practical challenges keep coming. He emphasises that winning an...

item.title: Economic hardships hit paraffin-dependent households while officials increase their salaries
item.description: While vehicle owners recently received some relief on fuel prices, the poorest South Africans who rely on paraffin are facing doubled costs, from R11.67 to R23.19 per litre. Government cushioning meas...

item.title: US Diplomatic Moves Prompt Realignment in Africa and Europe
item.description: Since Donald Trump returned to the White House in January 2025, South Africa has been at the forefront of US scrutiny in Africa. Relations quickly soured when the US cut major foreign aid, including H...

item.title: Challenges and Prospects of Introducing $40 Smartphones in Africa
item.description: The GSMA, a global mobile communications advocacy group, announced plans to pilot $40 4G smartphones in six African nations—Congo, Ethiopia, Nigeria, Rwanda, Tanzania, and Uganda—by 2026. The aim is t...

item.title: Centre clarifies Indian crude oil supplies remain secure despite reports of tanker diversion
item.description: The Union Government on Saturday categorically denied reports claiming that an Iranian crude oil tanker had been diverted from India to China due to alleged payment problems. According to official cla...

item.title: Federal Govt Directs Provinces to Regulate Prices Amid Fuel Hike
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Federal Minister for Planning, Development and Special Initiatives, Ahsan Iqbal, has directed provincial governments to take prompt measures to control inflation after the recent rise in fu...

item.title: Current Fuel Prices in Metro Manila and National Benchmarks as of April 5, 2026
item.description: Fuel prices in Metro Manila have remained high over the weekend, with April rates showing a significant increase compared to mid-March. This is primarily due to ongoing tensions in the Middle East, wh...

item.title: Australian Gambling Reforms Criticised for Failing to Protect Young People
item.description: After more than 1,000 days since the Murphy report highlighted the harms of online gambling, Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s response has been widely criticised for being insufficient. Independent s...

item.title: Government Reunites Thousands of Street Children With Families and Provides Support
item.description: Tanzania government don take big steps to protect children wey dey live for street. As of February 2026, dem don rescue total ya 5,353 children, with 5,007 of dem don already reunite with their famili...

item.title: People Sharing Personal Stories to Help Train AI Conversation Skills
item.description: Late last year, Gina engaged in a virtual counselling session with a pastor, sharing deeply personal experiences, including breakups, childhood trauma, and her father's struggles after serving in the ...

item.title: Lebogang Maile changes governance rules ahead of Gauteng executive reshuffle
item.description: As the Gauteng provincial government underwent an executive reshuffle, outgoing Finance and Economic Development MEC Lebogang Maile took steps to limit the influence of his successors in appointing se...

item.title: Sindh government grants two-day holiday to Christian employees for Easter celebrations
item.description: The Sindh government has officially announced a two-day holiday for Christian employees working in provincial government departments on the occasion of Easter. The holidays will be observed on April 5...
